import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import requests
key = os.environ.get\('TROVE_API_KEY', ''\)
print\(f'Key: {key[:6]}...'\)

r = requests.get\('https://api.trove.nla.gov.au/v3/result', 
    params={'q': 'Carrigtwohill Ireland', 'category': 'newspaper', 'encoding': 'json', 'n': 5},
    headers={'X-API-KEY': key},
    timeout=20\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    cats = data.get\('category', []\)
    for cat in cats:
        recs = cat.get\('records', {}\)
        articles = recs.get\('article', []\)
        total = recs.get\('total', '?'\)
        print\(f'Total results: {total}, returned: {len\(articles\)}'\)
        for a in articles[:5]:
            heading = a.get\('heading', '?'\)[:80]
            date = a.get\('date', '?'\)
            print\(f'  - [{date}] {heading}'\)
else:
    print\(f'Body: {r.text[:300]}'\)
")

import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)
import requests
key = os.environ.get\('EUROPEANA_API_KEY', ''\)
print\(f'Key: {key}'\)

r = requests.get\('https://api.europeana.eu/record/v2/search.json', params={
    'wskey': key,
    'query': 'Carrigtwohill',
    'rows': 5,
}, timeout=15\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
if r.status_code == 200:
    data = r.json\(\)
    total = data.get\('totalResults', 0\)
    items = data.get\('items', []\)
    print\(f'Total results: {total}, returned: {len\(items\)}'\)
    for item in items:
        title = \(item.get\('title'\) or ['?']\)[0][:80]
        provider = item.get\('dataProvider', ['?']\)[0] if item.get\('dataProvider'\) else '?'
        print\(f'  - {title} [{provider}]'\)
else:
    print\(f'Body: {r.text[:300]}'\)
")

import requests, re
from bs4 import BeautifulSoup

r = requests.get\('https://catalogue.nli.ie/Search/Results',
    params={'lookfor': 'Carrigtwohill', 'type': 'AllFields'},
    timeout=20\)
soup = BeautifulSoup\(r.text, 'lxml'\)

results = soup.find_all\('div', class_='result'\)[:10]
print\(f'Results: {len\(results\)}'\)
for i, item in enumerate\(results\):
    link = item.find\('a', href=True\)
    title_el = item.find\(['h2', 'h3']\)
    t = title_el.get_text\(strip=True\) if title_el else \(link.get_text\(strip=True\) if link else '?'\)
    href = link['href'] if link else ''
    print\(f'{i+1}. {t[:90]}'\)
    print\(f'   {href}'\)
")
